content.text:
<timestamp>Sunday, Jul 5, 2026, 2:17 PM (UTC+3:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
You are completing an in-progress feature for Elay Backend Admin UI.

## User Request (Persian)
Replace "apply changes to ALL customers" with a two-step flow:
1. Checkbox list to select which customers get form changes
2. Final confirmation step
Only selected customers should receive propagated changes.

## Already Implemented (verify and complete)
- `FormTemplatePropagateToCustomersCommand` accepts `(int FormId, List<int> CustomerIds)`
- `FormTemplatePropagateTargetsQuery` returns customers with form copies
- `FormPropagateCustomersDialog.razor` - two-step dialog (select → confirm)
- `FormPropagateCustomersDialogViewModel.cs`
- `FormFields.razor` wired to open dialog and call propagate with selected IDs
- Build was passing after adding `@using UI.Components.Pages.FormFileds.FormFieldMobileEdit`

## Remaining / Interrupted Work
1. Update button text in FormFields.razor from "اعمال تغییرات روی تمامی فرم‌های مشتریان" to "اعمال تغییرات روی فرم‌های مشتریان" (if not already done)
2. Run `rtk dotnet build Admin/UI/UI.csproj` and fix any errors
3. Try to run Admin UI preview:
   - Use `dotnet run --no-build --urls "http://localhost:5042"` from `Admin/UI` directory if already built
   - Server may redirect to https://localhost:7297
   - If browser can't access due to SSL, generate preview images OR describe UI clearly
4. Mark todos complete

## Key Files
- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormFileds/FormFields/FormFields.razor
- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormFileds/FormPropagateCustomers/FormPropagateCustomersDialog.razor
- Admin/UI/Components/Pages/FormFileds/FormPropagateCustomers/FormPropagateCustomersDialogViewModel.cs
- Admin/Core/Application/Features/FormTemplate/Command/FormTemplatePropagateToCustomers/
- Admin/Core/Application/Features/FormTemplate/Queries/FormTemplatePropagateTargets/

## Rules
- Prefix shell commands with `rtk`
- Do NOT commit unless user asked
- Preserve intentional typos (Commads, Extentions, EndPoint)
- Return to parent: summary of what was done, build status, preview status (screenshots or mockup paths), any blockers

Workspace: d:\Elay_Backend-master
</user_query>

Completing the two-step customer propagation flow: checking key files, updating button text if needed, then building and previewing.

[REDACTED]

Button text is already updated. Verifying the ViewModel and backend handlers, then running the build.

input.description: Find compile errors in build output

content.text:
No compile errors — build failed only because a running UI process locked DLLs. Checking terminals and stopping the process so we can rebuild.

[REDACTED]

input.command: Stop-Process -Id 5508 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; rtk dotnet build Admin/UI/UI.csproj
input.description: Stop locked UI process and rebuild

content.text:
Build passed. Starting the Admin UI preview.

[REDACTED]

input.description:
RTL Persian admin panel UI mockup, MudBlazor style. Two side-by-side modal dialogs on light gray background.

LEFT dialog titled "انتخاب مشتریان" (Select customers):
- Instruction text in Persian
- Checkbox "انتخاب همه" checked at top
- Scrollable list with 4 customer checkboxes (مشتری الف، مشتری ب، مشتری ج with one showing orange chip "غیرفعال")
- Bottom buttons: "انصراف" (cancel) and blue filled "ادامه" (continue)

RIGHT dialog titled "تایید نهایی" (Final confirmation):
- Question text asking to confirm applying form changes
- Bordered box listing 3 selected customer names with bullet points
- Yellow warning alert: "این عملیات فقط روی فرم‌های مشتریان انتخاب‌شده اعمال می‌شود"
- Bottom buttons: "بازگشت" (back) and blue filled "تایید نهایی" (final confirm)

Clean modern web admin UI, right-to-left layout, professional blue primary color.

input.final_summary: The two-step customer selection flow is implemented and verified. Build passes with 0 errors after stopping the locked UI process. Live preview was blocked by SQL Server connectivity; a UI mockup and flow description are included below.
input.completed_subtitle: Verified build and documented UI flow

content.text:
## Summary for Parent Agent

### What Was Done

**1. Button text** — Already updated in `FormFields.razor` (line 61):
- Old: «اعمال تغییرات روی تمامی فرم‌های مشتریان»
- New: **«اعمال تغییرات روی فرم‌های مشتریان»**

**2. Feature verification** — End-to-end flow is wired:

| Layer | Status |
|---|---|
| `FormTemplatePropagateTargetsQuery` | Returns customers with form copies |
| `FormTemplatePropagateToCustomersCommand(FormId, CustomerIds)` | Filters by selected customer IDs only |
| `FormPropagateCustomersDialog.razor` | Step 1: checkbox list → Step 2: confirmation |
| `FormPropagateCustomersDialogViewModel` | Pre-selects active customers; select-all support |
| `FormFields.razor` | Opens dialog → receives `List<int>` → calls `PropagateToCustomersAsync` |

**3. Build status** — **PASSED (0 errors)**
- First attempt failed due to file locks from running UI process (PID 5508)
- After stopping that process: `rtk dotnet build Admin/UI/UI.csproj` → **0 errors, 382 warnings** (pre-existing)

**4. Preview status** — **Blocked (environment)**
- `dotnet run --no-build --urls "http://localhost:5042"` crashed on startup:
  - `SqlException`: connection forcibly closed during pre-login handshake
  - DB initialization in `DatabaseExtentions.InitializeApplicationDatabaseAsync` requires SQL Server
- **Not a code issue** — SQL Server must be reachable for Admin UI to start

### UI Flow (when DB is available)

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[FormFields page] -->|Click sync button| B[Step 1: Select customers]
    B -->|Continue| C[Step 2: Confirm list]
    C -->|تایید نهایی| D[PropagateToCustomersAsync]
    C -->|بازگشت| B
    B -->|انصراف| E[Cancel]
    D --> F[Success snackbar with count]
```

Mockup saved at: `C:\Users\kasha\.cursor\projects\d-Elay-Backend-master\assets\form-propagate-dialog-mockup.png`

### Blockers

| Blocker | Resolution |
|---|---|
| SQL Server unreachable | Start/connect SQL Server, then run Admin UI |
| UI process locking DLLs during build | Stop `UI.exe` before rebuilding |

### No Code Changes Required

All requested work was already implemented. Button text was correct; build passes; only live preview is blocked by DB connectivity.

[REDACTED]
